summary: Iteration 22: Comprehensive testing of NEW SEO Agent and Tech Performance Agent features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). All new APIs working correctly. Frontend: All 4 agent tabs (Editor, Investigator, SEO, Tech) visible and functional on /agents page.

passed_tests: GET /api/agents/seo/latest returns full SEO report with seo_score, trending_keywords, tweets, content_gaps, meta_suggestions, strategy_report
GET /api/agents/seo/social-content returns tweets, instagram_captions, hashtag_sets, best_posting_times
GET /api/agents/seo/reports returns list of SEO reports
POST /api/agents/tech/run returns performance report with health_score, last_hour stats, top_endpoints
GET /api/agents/tech/metrics/recent returns recent raw API metrics
GET /api/agents/tech/reports returns list of performance reports
Performance middleware is tracking API calls (verified in perf_metrics)

seo_agent.run_endpoint: Returns status:started, runs as background subprocess
seo_agent.latest_report: Contains seo_score (40-45), trending_keywords (15 items including Telugu), tweets (5), content_gaps (5), meta_suggestions (5), strategy_report

tech_agent.run_endpoint: Generates and returns performance report synchronously
tech_agent.latest_report: Returns health_score (100), last_hour stats (requests, avg_ms, p95, errors), top_endpoints
tech_agent.metrics_recent: Returns last 100 raw API call metrics
tech_agent.metrics_endpoints: Returns aggregated per-endpoint stats (avg_ms, max_ms, requests, errors)

performance_middleware.verified_metrics: perf_metrics collection populated with endpoint, method, status_code, response_time_ms, timestamp

seo_tab_features: Social Media Posts sub-tab with tweets + copy buttons

existing_agents.editor_agent: WORKING - shows 30 articles analyzed, 3 hero stories, editorial

critical_code_review_comments: seo_agent.py: Well-structured with proper async LLM calls and error handling
tech_agent.py: Good performance middleware implementation with buffer flush logic
AgentsDashboard.jsx: Clean 4-tab implementation with proper data-testid attributes
ScoreRing component: Nice reusable SVG ring for health/SEO scores
CopyBtn component: Good UX for copying tweets to clipboard
seed_data_creation: None needed - SEO and Tech agents generate data from existing news articles and API metrics
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW features (SEO Agent and Tech Performance Agent) are fully implemented and working. Backend APIs for both agents return correct data. Frontend /agents page shows all 4 agent tabs with proper UI components. SEO tab has 3 sub-tabs (Overview, Social Media Posts, Strategy Report) all working. Tech tab shows health score, response metrics, and top endpoints with bar charts. Previous Telugu PDF issue (iteration 21) not retested - still pending fix.
